headline: Morgan Stanley stays bullish on aerospace, defense ahead of Q2 earnings
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley maintained a constructive outlook on the aerospace and defense sector ahead of second-quarter earnings, citing resilient commercial aerospace demand, improving aircraft production, and favorable long-term defense spending trends, while becoming more selective after recent stock volatility and valuation shifts.

headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades TransDigm Group to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $1345
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Kristine Liwag   downgrades TransDigm Group (NYSE:TDG) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $1680 to $1345.

headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Allstate, AMC Entertainment, Boeing, CAVA Group, Check Point Software, Digital Realty Trust, FedEx, IBM, UPS, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after a nice bounce-back day for Wall Street, as a tepid June consumer price index report, combined with the President dropping the big Strait of Hormuz tolls, brought buyers back to the table. When the final bell rang, all of the major indices finished the day higher. The ...
